steps.title: Identify the date constraint
steps.content: The statement requires an example of hoards discovered before 2000. This is the decisive filter for the correct answer.

steps.title: Test each choice
steps.content:
Choice D lists Broighter (1896) and Balline (1940) with accurate dates from the table. Choices A and C contain factual errors and include 2001; choice B claims a frequency not supported by the data.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
